helpful: google_web_search to find case status and Solicitor General amicus recommendation
gaps: mcp_courtlistener_search did not return the scotus/73274796 docket
fedcourts query ranged backend needs the remote DVC URL to be passed to the runner environment
notes: Since the local SQLite database wasn't pulled and the remote URL wasn't configured, we relied on Google web search and CourtListener MCP. Google web search was extremely helpful in identifying that the case is currently held pending St. Mary Catholic Parish v. Roy, which provides a very clear and high-confidence GVR prediction path.
